results.content: {"results": [{"title": "Entra ID vs Okta vs SailPoint: Understanding Their Real Roles in Enterprise IAM", "content": "Modern IAM is a layered architecture. Active Directory remains the foundational identity store for on-prem workloads. Microsoft Entra ID operates as the control plane for Zero Trust enforcement with Conditional Access, Identity Protection, PIM, Passwordless (FIDO2/WHfB). Okta excels as SaaS federation and access broker with SSO & MFA, SaaS integrations, Lifecycle automation. SailPoint complements both by owning identity governance with Joiner/Mover/Leaver processes, Access requests & approvals, Role modeling, Compliance & audit readiness. Zero Trust enforcement lives in the cloud control plane (Entra ID), governance lives in IGA (SailPoint), and federation is optimized through tools like Okta.", "url": "https://www.linkedin.com/posts/ridleyzileli_iam-identitysecurity-zerotrust-activity-7413778132601765888-2ira"}, {"title": "Okta vs Microsoft Entra ID: Access Management
